name: Virginia National Bankshares Corp
business: Virginia National Bankshares Corporation is a bank holding company whose wholly-owned subsidiary, Virginia National Bank, offers a full range of banking and related financial services to individuals, businesses, and charitable organizations. The company also provides fiduciary services through VNB Trust and Estate Services and had investment management services through Masonry Capital Management, LLC until its sale in 2024. The company has equity ownership interests in an independent insurance company and a title insurance company through a consortium of Virginia community banks.
